description: Long-form advertorial with editorial header, story-driven copy, 14 H2 sections, inline videos, Amazon-style testimonials, price anchoring, guarantee, trust badges. Desktop sidebar with product + reviews.

meta_title.example: SmoothSpine Triple Fusion Massager - The #1 At-Home Sciatica Solution

meta_description.example: Discover the 15-minute trick that ended 18 years of sciatica agony. 21,500+ users. 90-day guarantee.

headline.example: Top Physiotherapist: "This Is the Fastest Way to Fix Sciatica for Good"

subheadline.example: Former chronic pain sufferer exposes the $47 billion back pain conspiracy - and the 15-minute trick that ended 18 years of agony (without pills, shots, or surgery)

hero_rating_text.description: Rating count text below product image

byline_text.example: Written by Dr. Blane Schilling, PT, MD| Jul 15, 2025

opening_paragraphs.description: Opening hook paragraphs (4-8 short paras, 1-2 lines each). These set the tone and draw the reader in.
opening_paragraphs.example: I'm about to piss off every chiropractor, pain clinic, and spine surgeon in America.|Because what I'm about to share could cost them millions in lost revenue.|But I don't care.|After watching my wife cry herself to sleep for 3 years straight...|After blowing $23,000 on treatments that did nothing...|I discovered something that changed everything.

section_1_heading.description: H2 heading for pain story section

section_1_video_src.description: Video URL for section 1 (optional, can be image)

section_1_paragraphs.description: Pain story paragraphs - visceral, emotional, specific
section_1_paragraphs.example: It was 2:47 AM on a Tuesday.|I woke up to my wife Sarah sobbing in the bathroom.|Not crying. Sobbing.|The kind of raw, primal sound that makes your stomach drop.|She was on the floor, curled in the fetal position, her whole body shaking.

section_2_paragraphs.example: For the next 3 months, I lived like a man possessed.|I devoured every study. Called researchers in Switzerland.|And what I found made me want to punch a hole through my computer screen.|The entire back pain industry is built on a lie.

section_3_heading.description: H2 heading for root cause section
section_3_heading.example: THE REAL ROOT CAUSE OF SCIATICA

section_3_paragraphs.example: Picture your spine like a stack of jelly donuts.|The vertebrae are the donuts. The discs are the jelly filling.|When you're young, those discs are plump, juicy, full of fluid.|But here's what happens after age 30...

section_4_heading.example: THE 15-MINUTE MIRACLE HIDING IN PLAIN SIGHT

section_4_paragraphs.description: Solution story - how the discovery worked
section_4_paragraphs.example: Remember my wife on that bathroom floor?|Three weeks after my discovery, she was dancing at her sister's wedding.|No pills. No shots. No surgery.|Just 15 minutes a day of something so stupidly simple...

feature_boxes.description: 3 product feature boxes with icon + title + description

example.title: Dynamic Traction Therapy
example.description: gently stretches and separates your vertebrae, reducing pressure on pinched nerves.

example.title: TargetPoint Massage Therapy

example.title: Thermal Circulation Therapy
example.description: uses heat to boost rehydration and bring healing nutrients to damaged discs.

section_5_heading.description: H2 heading for industry pushback section
section_5_heading.example: THIS BREAKTHROUGH IS PISSING OFF AN ENTIRE INDUSTRY

section_6_heading.example: WHEN YOU MESS WITH $47 BILLION, THEY COME FOR YOU

section_7_heading.example: INTRODUCING THE DEVICE THAT ACTUALLY FIXES SCIATICA

section_7_paragraphs.description: Product introduction - name, what it does, why it's different

section_8_heading.description: H2 heading for how it works
section_8_heading.example: HERE'S EXACTLY HOW IT DESTROYS SCIATICA IN 15 MINUTES

section_9_heading.example: THE RESULTS THAT HAVE DOCTORS SCRAMBLING

section_10_paragraphs.description: Price comparison paragraphs (competitor costs vs product)

example: I couldn't sit through a meal without shooting pain down my leg
Standing for more than a few minutes left my lower back throbbing
I stopped gardening and walking with friends because I was too stiff
I was afraid to travel because long car rides left me in agony
I lost sleep almost every night due to pressure and nerve pain
I can sit comfortably for hours, no more nerve flare-ups
I stand, bend, and stretch without fear or hesitation
I've returned to my hobbies and even joined a walking group
I feel confident planning trips again and getting out of the house
I sleep soundly through the night with zero back pain

closing_signature.example: With love,|Dr. Blane Schilling|Creator, SmoothSpine Triple Fusion Massager|P.S. - I just got a text from my wife. She's at yoga class.|P.P.S. - The SmoothSpine is FDA-registered.|P.P.P.S. - Seriously, we're down to 3,847 units.

update_box_text.example: The demand for [Product] has increased dramatically and inventory has been flying off the shelves. Order your own for 60% OFF + FAST SHIPPING before it's too late.

trust_badge_images.description: 4 trust badge image URLs (guarantee, secure, returns, shipping)
trust_badge_images.notes: Keep existing badge images or replace with your own

trust_badge_guarantee.description: Guarantee text shown on trust badge (e.g., '90-Day Money-Back Guarantee')

sidebar_product_title.example: Finally! Get Instant Relief From Sciatica!

videos.description: The template has 8 video slots. Replace URLs with your product videos.
videos.notes: Videos autoplay muted loop. Replace src attributes. Can use images instead.

images.description: Product images, doctor photo, testimonial avatars, trust badges. Replace with your assets.
images.notes: Many images use CheckoutChamp CDN URLs. Replace with your own image hosting.
